title: US PPI Forecast Snapshot — Composite Calibrated Bridge Nowcast v2.5 Enhanced
summary: Temmuz 2026 PPI forecast: Headline +0.2% MoM, Core +0.3% MoM. VIX 15.03 → Normal regime. Enerji deflasyonu yavaşlıyor (Hormuz sonrası normalizasyon) ancak headline'a hâlâ hafif negatif katkı yapıyor. ISM Prices Paid 73.0 ile core goods enflasyonu yapışkan. ECI +0.30% aylık proxy hizmet sektörünü yukarı taşıyor. Intermediate demand Stage1=2.5, Stage2=1.8 → +0.12 ppt uplift. Net sonuç: Headline +0.2%, Core +0.3%.
baseCase: Headline PPI +0.2% MoM, Core PPI +0.3% MoM. Enerji kompoziti negatif (-1.2%) ama yavaşlayan düşüş. Core goods ISM 73.0 ve metal fiyatlarıyla yukarı (+0.65). Hizmetler ECI ile yapışkan (+0.21). Intermediate demand +0.12 uplift.

release.name: PPI
release.thesis: Enerji deflasyonu yavaşlıyor (Hormuz sonrası normalizasyon) ancak headline'a hâlâ hafif negatif katkı yapıyor. ISM Prices Paid 73.0 ile core goods enflasyonu yapışkan. ECI +0.30% aylık proxy hizmet sektörünü yukarı taşıyor. Intermediate demand Stage1=2.5, Stage2=1.8 → +0.12 ppt uplift. Net sonuç: Headline +0.2%, Core +0.3%.

scenarios.label: Base Case — Gradual Normalization
scenarios.outcome: Headline PPI +0.2% MoM, Core PPI +0.3% MoM. Energy deflation moderates as Hormuz-related supply disruptions fade. Core goods inflation stays sticky via ISM Prices Paid at 73.0. Services momentum anchored by ECI labor costs.
scenarios.marketReadthrough: Dovish-Fed supportive. 10Y yield fades toward 4.20%. DXY softens to ~100. Equities grind higher with tech outperforming.
scenarios.invalidation: ISM Prices Paid re-accelerates above 80; WTI snaps back above $85/bbl

scenarios.label: Hot Case — Core Sticky, Energy Rebounds
scenarios.outcome: Headline PPI +0.4% MoM, Core PPI +0.5% MoM. Iran ceasefire frays; Brent snaps back to $80+. ISM Prices Paid re-accelerates. Freight rates surge into peak season.
scenarios.marketReadthrough: Hawkish repricing. Fed dots shift to 2+ hikes. 2Y Treasury tests 4.80%. Cyclicals and energy outperform; growth/multiples compress.
scenarios.invalidation: Iran deal holds; China demand disappoints; ISM PMI drops below 50

scenarios.label: Cool Case — Disinflation Accelerates
scenarios.outcome: Headline PPI -0.1% MoM, Core PPI +0.1% MoM. Energy fully normalizes post-Hormuz. Dollar strength crushes import prices. Wholesale margin compression passes through.
scenarios.marketReadthrough: Risk-on. Rate-cut bets resurface for Q4. Small-caps and REITs outperform. Yield curve steepens.
scenarios.invalidation: Labor costs re-accelerate (ECI Q2 >1.0%); freight spike on hurricane season

setups.trigger: WTI fails $68 support post-EIA build; RSI < 50 on daily
setups.invalidation: WTI closes above $75 on weekly; SPR release announcement

setups.trigger: 10Y yield >4.45% on soft PPI print; curve steepening signal
setups.invalidation: Core PPI >+0.35% with ISM Prices Paid >75; Fed Warsh hawkish pivot

setups.trigger: DXY breaks below 100 on disinflation; real yields compress
setups.invalidation: DXY rallies >103 on safe-haven bid; 10Y real yield >2.0%

watchItems.label: ISM Prices Paid (July)
watchItems.note: Above 60 = strong core goods signal. Release Aug 1.

watchItems.label: EIA Weekly Petroleum (Jul 9)
watchItems.value: Crude inventories building; OPEC+ unwinding cuts

watchItems.label: BLS ECI Q2 2026
watchItems.note: Labor cost is single best services proxy. Q1 was +0.9% SA.

watchItems.label: Fed Funds Futures
watchItems.value: ~50% chance of hike by Oct 2026; DXY 100.97
watchItems.note: Warsh's first meeting (Jun 17) delivered hawkish dots. Jul 29 next.

keyDrivers: Energy deflation moderating: Hormuz reopening drove crude -25% MoM in June; refined products lagging but gasoline supply cushion evaporated.
ISM Prices Paid sticky at 73.0: Down from 82.1 but still strongly inflationary for core goods; steel/aluminum/copper all elevated.
ECI labor cost anchoring services: Q1 +0.9% SA (+0.30% monthly proxy) keeps Other Services PPI elevated; Q2 release Jul 31 critical.
Freight rates firming into Q3: DAT spot dry van rising; produce season + cross-border demand tightening capacity.
Dollar strength capping import prices: DXY 100.97 up 3.17% YoY; offsets some core goods pressure via cheaper imports.
risks: Upside — Iran ceasefire frays: Any Hormuz shipping disruption snaps energy prices higher; distillate stocks at low levels amplifies shock.
Upside — Steel/tariff escalation: EU CBAM + US Section 232 at 50%; HRC $1,175/ton at multi-year highs; mills prioritizing contract over spot.
Downside — Demand destruction: Gasoline pump >$4.00 nationwide; consumer credit delinquencies rising; retail sales could crack.
Downside — Hurricane season: LNG export disruption could crash natural gas; refinery outages spike RBOB/ULSD temporarily.
